## Spec Checklist

- [ ] Does this change have a corresponding spec or update an existing one?
- [ ] Is `PRODUCT_MAP.md` updated with the correct status?
- [ ] Are any new architectural decisions captured in an ADR and linked from the spec?
- [ ] Is `CLAUDE.md` still accurate? (Update it if any invariants, module boundaries, or key facts changed.)
- [ ] Is `GLOSSARY.md` updated if new terminology was introduced?
- [ ] Is `CONSTRAINTS.md` updated if a new non-negotiable was discovered?

## Documentation Acceptance (required for feature PRs)

- [ ] AC-DOC-001: PRODUCT_MAP.md reflects correct status
- [ ] AC-DOC-002: CLAUDE.md updated if invariants changed
- [ ] AC-DOC-003: CHANGELOG entry added
- [ ] AC-DOC-004: Any ADRs made during implementation are merged and linked
